Papers I like

Neuroscience

  • Hubel and Wisel (1959) - Receptive fields of single neurones in the cat’s striate cortex (paper) (video)

Adversarial Learning/Attacks/Defenses

  • Khoury and Hanfield-Manell (2018) - On the Geometry of Adversarial Examples (paper)
  • Gilmer et. al. (2018) - The Relationship Between High-DimensionalGeometry and Adversarial Examples (paper)
